name: Fettuccine with Hot Mexican Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 ounces canned no-added-salt stewed tomatoes, undrained
16 ounces canned kidney beans, rinsed and drained
4 cups hot cooked fettuccine (cooked without salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray. Place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until tender.
3. Stir in tomatoes, green chiles, cilantro, chili powder, sugar, and oregano.
4. Cover and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Mash the beans slightly, and stir into the tomato mixture.
7. Serve over hot cooked fettuccine.
